title: '--x-assign unique' in combination with a parameter containing X

features.name: x-assign with wildcard equality right operand
features.description: Code should include an X-assign setting combined with wildcard equality operators (==? or !=?) where an X-valued expression appears on the right operand side

features.name: parameter concatenation with X valued bits
features.description: Code should include a parameter that uses concatenation with X valued bits, such as a replication operator containing 1'bx

features.name: wildcard equality operators with X operands
features.description: Code should include wildcard equality operators (==? or !=?) where at least one operand contains X or Z valued bits
